creator: jhs@FreeBSD.org
text:
New Port to be committed please
	PS for information of the committer:
	I periodically upload my latest version to 
  http://www.freebsd.org/~jhs/src/bsd/fixes/FreeBSD/ports/generic/comms/estic/
	but as of writing, the uuencoded version below is newer than the web
	version, & I'll delete my web version (once it's commited),
	& the web URL will hold nothing until later uncommited changes
	may be pending.

Fix: uudecode & apply the following 
	(created by	tar zcf - estic | uuencode estic.tgz	)
How-To-Repeat: 
	-
